motivation: F5/F8: prompting cannot make the VLM a reliable dynamic classifier

C2_d3c_drift_without_d4a.meaning: rule inherits evidence quality; D4A mandatory in deployment

C3_perfect_tracker_probe.meaning: dynamic true positive the VLM never produced (real recorded static@0.7 attached as annotation); GT-derived probe diagnostic_only

architecture_conclusion: deterministic floor (symbolic detection) + learned ceiling (VLM semantics; future finetune competes for ceiling only); floor retained permanently as defense in depth
remaining_online_gap: end-to-end online trigger still blocked by F1 (GDINO target selection) and F3 (SAM2 drift); dataset/perception work
